nasb.text: He said to them, “Thus and so has Micah done to me, and he has hired me and I have become his priest.”

esv.text: And he said to them, “This is how Micah dealt with me: he has hired me, and I have become his priest.”

cnv.text: 他回答他們：“米迦如此這般待我；他雇了我，我就作了他的祭司。”

ccb.text: 那青年便把米迦聘他做祭司的事告诉了他们。
